matched_testcase_text: test case id: tc-u-environment-007 title: join/view event module: u-environment source pages: 1 preconditions: event exists and user is logged in test data: event id test steps: 1. navigate to the "join/view event" activity from the u-environment 2. select the event to join or view 3. click on the "join" or "view" button expected result: user should be able to join or view the selected event

test case id: tc-u-environment-025 title: edge case - empty event description during joining/viewing module: u-environment source pages: 1 preconditions: event exists and user is logged in test data: empty event description test steps: 1. navigate to the "join/view event" activity from the u-environment 2. select the event to join or view 3. leave the event description field empty 4. click on the "join" or "view" button expected result: event should be joined or viewed successfully without a description

test case id: tc-u-environment-001 title: user registration module: u-environment source pages: 1 preconditions: test data: valid email, password, and confirm password test steps: 1. navigate to the "register activity" from the u-environment 2. enter a valid email address 3. enter a valid password 4. confirm the password 5. click on the "register" button expected result: user should be registered successfully and redirected to the login page

test case id: tc-u-environment-006 title: create event module: u-environment source pages: 1 preconditions: user is logged in test data: event name, date, time, location, description test steps: 1. navigate to the "create event" activity from the u-environment 2. fill in the event details (name, date, time, location, description) 3. click on the "create" button expected result: event should be created successfully and displayed in the list of events

test case id: tc-u-environment-012 title: edge case - empty email during registration module: u-environment source pages: 1 preconditions: test data: empty email field test steps: 1. navigate to the "register activity" from the u-environment 2. leave the email field empty 3. enter a valid password 4. confirm the password 5. click on the "register" button expected result: error message should appear indicating an empty email field

test case id: tc-u-environment-021 title: edge case - empty event description during creation module: u-environment source pages: 1 preconditions: user is logged in test data: empty event description test steps: 1. navigate to the "create event" activity from the u-environment 2. enter a valid event name 3. enter a valid event date 4. enter a valid event time 5. enter a valid event location 6. leave the event description field empty 7. click on the "create" button expected result: event should be created successfully without a description

test case id: tc-u-environment-014 title: edge case - mismatched passwords during registration module: u-environment source pages: 1 preconditions: test data: different passwords test steps: 1. navigate to the "register activity" from the u-environment 2. enter a valid email address 3. enter a valid password 4. enter a different password in the confirmation field 5. click on the "register" button expected result: error message should appear indicating mismatched passwords

test case id: tc-u-environment-003 title: user login module: u-environment source pages: 1 preconditions: user has been registered test data: registered email and password test steps: 1. navigate to the "login activity" from the u-environment 2. enter the registered email address 3. enter the registered password 4. click on the "login" button expected result: user should be logged in successfully and redirected to the dashboard

test case id: tc-u-environment-015 title: edge case - empty email during login module: u-environment source pages: 1 preconditions: user has been registered test data: empty email field test steps: 1. navigate to the "login activity" from the u-environment 2. leave the email field empty 3. enter a valid password 4. click on the "login" button expected result: error message should appear indicating an empty email field

test case id: tc-u-environment-002 title: invalid email registration module: u-environment source pages: 1 preconditions: test data: invalid email (e.g., missing '@' symbol) test steps: 1. navigate to the "register activity" from the u-environment 2. enter an invalid email address 3. enter a valid password 4. confirm the password 5. click on the "register" button expected result: error message should appear indicating an invalid email format

test case id: tc-u-environment-022 title: edge case - empty event date during joining/viewing module: u-environment source pages: 1 preconditions: event exists and user is logged in test data: empty event date test steps: 1. navigate to the "join/view event" activity from the u-environment 2. select the event to join or view 3. leave the event date field empty 4. click on the "join" or "view" button expected result: error message should appear indicating an empty event date

test case id: tc-u-environment-026 title: edge case - empty profile information during update module: u-environment source pages: 1 preconditions: user is logged in test data: empty profile fields test steps: 1. navigate to the "profile" activity from the u-environment 2. leave all profile fields empty 3. click on the "save" button expected result: error message should appear indicating empty profile fields

test case id: tc-u-environment-016 title: edge case - empty password during login module: u-environment source pages: 1 preconditions: user has been registered test data: empty password field test steps: 1. navigate to the "login activity" from the u-environment 2. enter a valid email address 3. leave the password field empty 4. click on the "login" button expected result: error message should appear indicating an empty password field

test case id: tc-u-environment-004 title: invalid login module: u-environment source pages: 1 preconditions: user has been registered test data: incorrect email or password test steps: 1. navigate to the "login activity" from the u-environment 2. enter an incorrect email address 3. enter an incorrect password 4. click on the "login" button expected result: error message should appear indicating incorrect credentials

test case id: tc-u-environment-008 title: manage user profile module: u-environment source pages: 1 preconditions: user is logged in test data: updated profile information (name, email, password) test steps: 1. navigate to the "profile" activity from the u-environment 2. update the profile information (name, email, password) 3. click on the "save" button expected result: user's profile information should be updated successfully

test case id: tc-u-environment-005 title: manage newsletters module: u-environment source pages: 1 preconditions: user is logged in test data: subscription status (subscribe/unsubscribe) test steps: 1. navigate to the "newsletter activity" from the u-environment 2. select the newsletter to subscribe or unsubscribe 3. click on the "subscribe" or "unsubscribe" button expected result: user's subscription status should be updated accordingly

test case id: tc-u-environment-013 title: edge case - empty password during registration module: u-environment source pages: 1 preconditions: test data: empty password field test steps: 1. navigate to the "register activity" from the u-environment 2. enter a valid email address 3. leave the password field empty 4. confirm the password 5. click on the "register" button expected result: error message should appear indicating an empty password field

test case id: tc-u-environment-017 title: edge case - empty event name during creation module: u-environment source pages: 1 preconditions: user is logged in test data: empty event name test steps: 1. navigate to the "create event" activity from the u-environment 2. leave the event name field empty 3. fill in the remaining event details (date, time, location, description) 4. click on the "create" button expected result: error message should appear indicating an empty event name

test case id: tc-u-environment-023 title: edge case - empty event time during joining/viewing module: u-environment source pages: 1 preconditions: event exists and user is logged in test data: empty event time test steps: 1. navigate to the "join/view event" activity from the u-environment 2. select the event to join or view 3. leave the event time field empty 4. click on the "join" or "view" button expected result: error message should appear indicating an empty event time

test case id: tc-u-environment-024 title: edge case - empty event location during joining/viewing module: u-environment source pages: 1 preconditions: event exists and user is logged in test data: empty event location test steps: 1. navigate to the "join/view event" activity from the u-environment 2. select the event to join or view 3. leave the event location field empty 4. click on the "join" or "view" button expected result: error message should appear indicating an empty event location

test case id: tc-u-environment-018 title: edge case - empty event date during creation module: u-environment source pages: 1 preconditions: user is logged in test data: empty event date test steps: 1. navigate to the "create event" activity from the u-environment 2. enter a valid event name 3. leave the event date field empty 4. fill in the remaining event details (time, location, description) 5. click on the "create" button expected result: error message should appear indicating an empty event date

test case id: tc-u-environment-020 title: edge case - empty event location during creation module: u-environment source pages: 1 preconditions: user is logged in test data: empty event location test steps: 1. navigate to the "create event" activity from the u-environment 2. enter a valid event name 3. enter a valid event date 4. enter a valid event time 5. leave the event location field empty 6. fill in the remaining event details (description) 7. click on the "create" button expected result: error message should appear indicating an empty event location
